title: Smile's XP Storage
description: Store your XP in any Item you want!
body:
# XP Storage mod is here! **Smile's XP Storage** mod adds a storage feature where players can now store their Experience Points to ANY ITEM they want. ## How to use? 1. Rename any item to "XP" to make it an XP item 2. Store XP using `Sneak + Right Click` (while holding it on main hand) 3. Withdraw XP using just `Right Click` (while holding it on main hand) ## Server side or client side? This mod can be fully server side. However, to show the stored XP in the item description, you need to install it on your client as well.
![Gap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d465c2d462393aadd35a497bea0b28052cac913.png) ❤️I will appreciate any amount of donation support to keep my modding work ongoing!❤️

![Gap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d465c2d462393aadd35a497bea0b28052cac913.png) ## Latest Changes - **v1.1** - Released for 26.1, 26.1.1, 26.1.2
